In Path 3, Marcus misses his gunshot meant to hit Surgey because Surgey notices Marcus acting fishy. The stray bullet hits Dr. Penelope, causing her to bleed out. Surgey fires back on Marcus and Jillian, killing them both. Surgey runs, leading to uncontained spread from the lab and doomsday of continental America. Surgey later manipulates a group of survivors to carpet bomb a border around Northern Canada, but the bombs are filled with parasites aimed at the USSR, resulting in global apocalypse.
